chart_type: small grouped bar chart, stippled GC2 fill, symmetric y-error bars
method: §4a bar tops (preserved from prior extraction) + new yerr pass: stem-gated upper-cap detection (topmost ≥5-px dark row above bar top whose downward column has no other wide-dark row and a stem dark in ≥40% of rows). Lower cap mirrored to symmetric yerr. x-positions snapped to categorical {24, 27, 30}.
phase4_evidence: Detected yerr per bar within 0.5 of ground truth (21.37-25.05 detected vs 21.5-25.3 in GT). GC2 hatched fill; long-form legend ('Mean number of eggs/female in GC1/2/3').
